title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Trump challenges birthright citizenship
slides.explanation: Donald Trump says he wants the Supreme Court to revisit the 14th Amendment. He points to a report about maternity services near the border as his reasoning.

slides.headline: Tensions rise in the Persian Gulf
slides.explanation: The US launched new airstrikes against Iran this week. In response, Iran targeted sites in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Qatar, putting a fragile peace deal at risk.

slides.headline: Tragedy at a Bangladesh school
slides.explanation: Heavy monsoon rains caused a deadly landslide that hit a girls' school in Bangladesh. Rescuers have recovered eight bodies from the mud so far.

slides.headline: Terry Rozier eyes NBA return
slides.explanation: Former Miami Heat player Terry Rozier is hoping to return to the league. However, his current bail conditions regarding sports gambling charges might make that difficult.

slides.headline: Political dispute over SA emergency calls
slides.explanation: There is a debate over claims that someone died during a Telstra outage in South Australia. Police say they have no record of such a death, despite comments from senator Kerrynne Liddle.

caption: Here are the top stories you need to know today. From rising tensions in the Gulf to a tragic landslide in Bangladesh, we have the latest updates. Stay informed with Headlinne. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: Google pays out for Linux security flaw
slides.explanation: Google handed over $250,000 to fix a serious Linux vulnerability. It could have let unauthorized users gain full control of virtual machines.

slides.headline: Obsidian shifts focus to new Fallout game
slides.explanation: Microsoft is shaking up its Xbox strategy after recent layoffs. As part of these changes, Obsidian Entertainment is moving away from Avowed to work on a new Fallout project.

slides.headline: Deal alert: AirFly Pro for $40
slides.explanation: Need to use your wireless headphones on a plane? The Twelve South AirFly Pro is currently discounted by $15 on Amazon, making it a handy travel accessory.

slides.headline: Feds warn self-driving car firms
slides.explanation: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration says autonomous vehicle companies must stop getting in the way of emergency responders. They emphasize that emergency scenes are not just minor edge cases.

slides.headline: ChatGPT voice mode gets an upgrade
slides.explanation: OpenAI is rolling out a new voice model that feels more natural. It is better at listening, knows when to wait for you to finish, and interrupts much less often.

caption: From major gaming shifts to a smarter ChatGPT, here is what is happening in tech today. We have rounded up the top stories so you can stay in the loop. Swipe through to catch up on the latest updates. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
